ident_heading: PRIVACY POLICY FOR VSRAY TECHNOLOGY APPLICATIONS
heading_content_part: PRIVACY POLICY FOR VSRAY TECHNOLOGY APPLICATIONSLast Update: December 20, 2016Thanks for your interest in Vsray Technology. Your privacy is important to us.ÂThis privacy policy governs your use of all VSRAY TECHNOLOGY applications ('Application') for mobile devices

The Application may collect certain information automatically, including, but not limited to, the type of mobile device you use, your mobile devices unique device ID, the IP address of your mobile device, your mobile operating system, the type of mobile Internet browsers you use, and information about the way you use the Application. We collect all these information in anonymous group. Only aggregated, anonymized data is periodically transmitted to external services to help us improve the Application and our service.Â We will share your information with third parties only in the ways that are described in this privacy statement.

CUSTOMER SERVICEWe may collect your email address when you contact our customer service group and we may use that email address to contact you about your gaming experience with Mana Cube games 	and notify you about company news and promotions.
Read/Modify or Delete USB/SD storageWe may save/read/delete data which produce with this app in your USB/SD storage. We will not collect/delete your personal data.
READ_PHONE_STATEWe use this permission to verify the user/phone with IMEI information but we will not store it. This information is using for our analysis

What are my opt-out rights?ÂYou can stop all collection of information by the Application easily by uninstalling the Application. You may use the standard uninstall processes as may be available as part of your mobile device or via the mobile application marketplace or network.Â
Contact usIf you have any questions regarding privacy while using the Application, or have questions about our practices, please contact us via email at itisamazingmobile@gmail.com
